entities.name: SPODOPTERA LITURA
entities.description: Tobacco caterpillar, a moth species whose population is monitored in groundnut crops

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hyopogaea L, the crop in which Spodoptera litura populations are monitored

entities.name: PHEROMONE TRAPPING
entities.description: A procedure using pheromone-trap designs to catch male moths

entities.name: SINGLE-FUNNEL TRAP
entities.description: A specific pheromone trap design, 20 cm in diameter, found to be most effective for capturing moths

entities.name: DOUBLE-FUNNEL TRAP
entities.description: A pheromone trap design compared for efficacy in catching moths

entities.name: SLEEVE TRAP
entities.description: A pheromone trap design from which moths were observed to escape

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the national monitoring network for S. litura is implemented

entities.name: MONITORING
entities.description: The systematic tracking of S. litura populations using a national network
